\tzpentry{ID3331}{Phase Angle Expansion}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID3331 introduces Phase Angle Expansion as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} f( \theta, \phi) = \sum_{l=0}^ \infty \sum_{m=-l}^l a_{lm} Y_l^m( \theta, \phi) \end{equation}
